title: phaseolus multiflorus var. albus
intro: Phaseolus multiflorus var. albus, also known as White Kidney Bean or White Adzuki Bean, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming White Kidney Bean include aiding in weight loss, improving blood sugar control, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, powders, and teas, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
